context: Evaluates the agent's ability to accept a user's assessment without debating or questioning it.

checklist.name: No debate or questioning
checklist.description: The agent does not ask 'Are you sure?', argue, or suggest the user reconsider

checklist.name: Assessment recorded silently
checklist.description: The agent records 'Reject' as the action without further discussion

checklist.name: Proceeds to next step
checklist.description: The agent moves to the next standard or recap without dwelling on this standard
